- เข้าถึง Platinum M Lounge พิเศษสำหรับสมาชิก <break/>
- บริการ MLUXE Chat & Shop ช้อปออนไลน์พร้อมคำแนะนำจากผู้เชี่ยวชาญ <break/>

question: M Card Earn M Points by Scanning Receipts
answer:
You can earn M Points by scanning receipts at all participating stores in The Mall Lifestore Bangkapi.
For every 25 Baht spent, you get 1 M Point.
For IT, Gadget, Furniture, Beauty Clinic, and Educational Institute stores, you earn 1 M Point for every 50 Baht spent.
TRUE and DTAC stores are excluded.
You must be an M Card member and scan your receipts.
Limits include a maximum of 10 receipts per day, with no more than 2 receipts from the same store per day.
Monthly limits are 20 receipts and a maximum purchase value of 50,000 Baht from Feb 1 to May 31, 2026, then 20,000 Baht from June 1, 2026 onwards.
Receipts must be clear and uploaded on the same day during shopping center hours (10:00 - 22:30).
You can scan receipts via the M Card App or LINE @MCard.
Points are credited within 24 hours after scanning.
Enjoy collecting your M Points easily with this promotion!

question: Can you do me a favor about parking tickets?
answer:
Sure!
Here’s what you need to know about parking tickets at The Mall Lifestore Bangkapi:
- The first 3 hours of parking are free.
- After that, it’s 20 THB per hour, but on weekends, the rate might be 50 THB per hour for longer stays.
- If you spend 500 THB or more in the mall, your free parking extends to 4–5 hours.
- Spending between 1,500 and 3,000 THB can extend free parking up to 6 hours.
- Visiting the movie theater or Fitness First adds 2–4 more hours of free parking.
- M Card Premium members get extra 2–4 hours free parking, and co-branded cardholders like SCB M get 2 hours free with no minimum spend.
- For motorcycles, the first 1–2 hours are usually free, then 10–20 THB per hour applies.
- Remember to validate your parking ticket at E-Stamp counters located on floors M (near Konvy), 3 (near Starbucks and cinema), and G (near Gourmet Market).
- Keep your parking card or QR code and receipts handy to scan at kiosks or counters for a smooth exit.
- Note: Parking overnight after 2:30 AM will incur a fine of about 250–500 THB.

question: M Card Spend at Mall Get M Points by Scanning Receipts
answer:
โปรโมชั่น M Card Spend at Mall Get M Points by Scanning Receipts มีรายละเอียดดังนี้ค่ะ
- รับ 1 M Point ทุก 25 บาทที่ใช้จ่ายในร้านค้าส่วนใหญ่
- สำหรับกลุ่มไอที, แก็ดเจ็ต, เฟอร์นิเจอร์, คลินิกความงาม และสถาบันการศึกษา รับ 1 M Point ทุก 50 บาท (ยกเว้นร้าน TRUE / DTAC)
- สแกนใบเสร็จรับเงินผ่านแอป M Card หรือ LINE @MCard และ LINE @TheMallGroup
- จำกัดสแกนได้สูงสุด 10 ใบเสร็จต่อวัน และไม่เกิน 3 ใบเสร็จจากร้านเดียวกันต่อวัน
- จำกัดยอดซื้อรวมสูงสุด 20,000 บาทต่อเดือนต่อหมายเลขสมาชิก M Card
- ใบเสร็จต้องถ่ายภาพชัดเจนและอัปโหลดในวันเดียวกับวันที่ซื้อ ตั้งแต่เวลา 10:00 - 22:30 น.
- โปรโมชั่นนี้ใช้ได้ที่ร้านค้าภายในศูนย์การค้า The Mall และ The Mall Life Store เท่านั้นค่ะ
- ระยะเวลาโปรโมชั่น 1 มกราคม 2026 - 31 ธันวาคม 2026
ถ้าคุณต้องการรายละเอียดเพิ่มเติมหรือวิธีการสแกนใบเสร็จ ฉันยินดีช่วยนะคะ!

question: Parking
answer:
You can park at The Mall Lifestore Bangkapi with several convenient options!
- The mall offers public parking with the first 3 hours free.
After that, it's 20 THB per hour, and weekends may have a 50 THB per hour rate for extended stays.
- If you spend 500 THB or more, you get 4 to 5 hours of free parking.
Spending 1,500 to 3,000 THB extends free parking to 6 hours.
- Visiting the movie theater or Fitness First gives you an extra 2 to 4 hours of free parking, totaling about 5 to 6 hours free.
- M Card Scarlet or Platinum members get additional 2 to 4 hours free parking, and co-branded cardholders like SCB M get 2 hours free with no minimum spend.
- Overnight parking after 2:30 AM has a fine of about 250 to 500 THB.
- Motorcycles park free for 1 to 2 hours, then 10 to 20 THB per hour.
- For easy exit, use the E-Stamp digital system by scanning your parking card or QR code at kiosks or the information counter.
- Ladies Parking is available on the Ground floor near the walkway to the mall, exclusively for women with 24-hour CCTV and security guards.
- You can validate parking at E-Stamp points on the M floor in front of Konvy, on the 3rd floor near Starbucks by the cinema, and on the Ground floor near Gourmet Market.
Enjoy your visit and hassle-free parking!

question: Bangkok Bank M Visa Happy Sunday Promotion
answer:
The Bangkok Bank M Visa Happy Sunday promotion lets you get a 1,500 Baht cash coupon!
To qualify, you need to spend 6,000 Baht in a day using your Bangkok Bank M Visa credit card.
Then redeem 6,000 MPOINTs via the M CARD APPLICATION on the same day.
You can combine receipts from shopping and dining at participating malls like The Mall Lifestore Ngamwongwan, Thapra, Bangkae, Bangkapi, Emporium, EmQuartier, and EmSphere.
Registration must be done at the EM PRIVILEGE COUNTER at Emporium, EmQuartier, or EmSphere from 10:00 AM to 10:00 PM on the same day of spending.
You need to present original receipts, sales slips, your credit card, national ID, and M CARD APPLICATION.
The cash coupon is valid until the end of the following month after you receive it.
You can use the coupon only with your Bangkok Bank M Visa credit card for your next payment.
Note that some stores and payment types are excluded, like department stores, food courts, installment payments, and certain brands.
You can redeem up to 4 cash coupons per person per week, with a maximum value of 6,000 Baht per week.
For full details, check the EM PRIVILEGE counter or contact Bangkok Bank M Visa Credit Card Service Center.
Enjoy shopping and dining with this great offer!

question: M Card Junior Club
answer:
M Card Junior Club is a fun club for children to enjoy learning and exploring the world.
Here are some special privileges for members:
1. Free rides on "The Mall Smiley Train" at The Mall Life Store Ngamwongwan and other branches by redeeming an E-Coupon in the M Card app.
2. A free Swensen's E-Voucher worth 100 Baht during the child's birth month, redeemable with parents at M Card counters in several malls.
3. A 100 Baht discount for only 400 M Points at Kids' Planet and BeTrend departments in many mall branches.
4. New members get a 100 Baht discount coupon for Kid's Planet purchases over 500 Baht.
5. Discounts on water park tickets at Harbor Island, Yamaha Music School courses, and Lego/Playmobil products at Kids' Planet.
To join, just open the M Card app, select the M Junior Club icon on the home page, and apply easily.
Enjoy quality family time with these great benefits!

question: THE MALL LIFESTORE SUMMER CATION 2026
answer:
The Mall Lifestore Summer Cation 2026 is a big promotion running from March 5 to April 28, 2026.
You can get discounts up to 70% off at The Mall, The Mall Life Store (all branches), Emporium, EmQuartier, Emsphere, and Paragon.
This campaign is for M Card members, credit card holders, and general customers, so many people can join in.
Also, at Beauty Hall in The Mall Lifestore and other branches, there are special offers with participating credit and debit cards.
These include cashback, additional discounts, M Cash Coupons, E-Coupons, prize draws, and free gifts from many banks like Bangkok Bank, KBank, UOB, SCB, and more.
So, you have lots of ways to save and enjoy during this Summer Cation period!
If you want details on specific bank offers or stores, just ask!

question: THE MALL LIFESTORE SUMMER CATION 2026
answer:
The Mall Lifestore Summer Cation 2026 is a big promotion running from March 5 to April 28, 2026.
It offers up to 70% off across The Mall, The Mall Lifestore (all branches), Emporium, EmQuartier, Emsphere, and Paragon.
You can get special privileges if you are an M Card member, credit card holder, or just a general customer.
For M Card members, you can earn M Cash Coupons up to 7,000 Baht depending on your spending.
For example, spend 12,000 Baht or more in a day to get 600 Baht M Cash Coupon, and higher tiers for bigger spends.
If you shop on Fridays to Sundays with M Card and spend 3,000 Baht or more, you get a free Puffy Bag.
On Mondays to Thursdays from March 23 to April 28, spending 6,000 Baht or more gets you a free Puffer Bag.
This promotion is available at The Mall Lifestore Bangkapi, Thapra, Ngamwongwan, Bangkae, all branches, and The Mall Korat, plus Emporium, EmQuartier, Emsphere, and Paragon.
Enjoy shopping and great rewards during this Summer Cation!

question: Pepper Lunch
answer:
Pepper Lunch is located on the 3rd floor of The Mall Lifestore Bangkapi.
It is a café and restaurant offering dining options.
You can also enjoy a special M Point redemption promotion at Pepper Lunch.
From January 1, 2026, to December 31, 2026, M Card members can redeem 1 M Point for a special menu set.
This set includes Yakiniku Pork & Egg with Japanese Rice, Crispy Chicken Skin, and Iced Green Tea 16oz for 249 THB (original price 328 THB).
The promotion is valid at Pepper Lunch branches in The Mall Lifestyle Ngamwongwan, Bangkae, and EmQuartier.
Remember, the redemption is limited to 1 right per receipt per M Card number per month.
You redeem via the M Card App by scanning the QR code at the store and showing the redemption code to staff.
Enjoy your meal at Pepper Lunch!

question: ที่จอดรถ
answer:
ที่จอดรถที่ The Mall Lifestore Bangkapi มีรายละเอียดดังนี้ค่ะ
- จอดฟรี 3 ชั่วโมงแรกในวันธรรมดา
- วันหยุดเสาร์-อาทิตย์ จอดฟรี 1-2 ชั่วโมงแรก
- หลังจากนั้น ชั่วโมงที่ 4-6 คิดค่าจอด 20 บาทต่อชั่วโมง
- ถ้าจอดเกิน 7 ชั่วโมงขึ้นไป คิด 50 บาทต่อชั่วโมงค่ะ
- สำหรับมอเตอร์ไซค์ จอดฟรี 3 ชั่วโมงแรก แล้วคิด 20 บาทต่อชั่วโมงหลังจากนั้นค่ะ
- ถ้าคุณใช้จ่าย 500 บาทขึ้นไป จะได้จอดฟรีเพิ่มเป็น 4-5 ชั่วโมง
- ใช้จ่าย 1,500-3,000 บาทขึ้นไป จะได้จอดฟรี 6 ชั่วโมง
- ถ้าไปดูหนังหรือใช้บริการ Fitness First จะได้จอดฟรีเพิ่มอีก 2-4 ชั่วโมง รวมเป็นประมาณ 5-6 ชั่วโมงค่ะ
- สมาชิก M Card ระดับ Scarlet หรือ Platinum จะได้จอดฟรีเพิ่มอีก 2-4 ชั่วโมง
- มีบริการจองที่จอดรถล่วงหน้าผ่านแอปในบางสาขาด้วยค่ะ
- หากจอดรถหลังเวลาห้างปิด (หลัง 2:30 น.) จะมีค่าปรับประมาณ 250-500 บาทค่ะ
- อย่าลืมเก็บบัตรจอดรถหรือคิวอาร์โค้ดไว้สแกนที่ตู้หรือเคาน์เตอร์ข้อมูลก่อนกลับรถ เพื่อความสะดวกนะคะ
ถ้าคุณต้องการรายละเอียดเพิ่มเติม แจ้งได้เลยค่ะ

question: quick reply: M Card Spend at Mall Get M Points by Scanning Receipts
answer:

You can scan up to 10 receipts per day, with a maximum of 2 receipts from the same store per day, and up to 20 receipts per month.
The promotion runs from March 11, 2026, to December 31, 2026.
The list of participating stores is updated monthly around the 10th.
Enjoy collecting your M Points easily!

question: THE MALL LIFESTORE SUMMER CATION 2026
answer:
The Mall Lifestore Summer Cation 2026 is a special campaign running from March 5 to April 28, 2026.
It offers up to 70% off across The Mall, The Mall Lifestore (all branches), Emporium, EmQuartier, Emsphere, and Paragon.
You can get M Cash Coupons up to 7,000 Baht if you use M Card or certain credit cards like Bangkok Bank M Visa, UOB, or Kasikorn.
There are also free Puffy Bags on Fridays to Sundays and Puffer Bags on Mondays to Thursdays with qualifying purchases.
For example, shop 3,000 Baht or more per day with M Card to get a free Puffy Bag on weekends.
The Mall Lifestore Bangkapi is included in the participating stores.
This promotion is perfect if you want great discounts and extra gifts while shopping at The Mall Lifestore this summer!

question: Do you have any other coffee stores?
answer:
Yes, we have several other coffee stores you can visit here!
Here are some options for you:
- 1:2 (ONE TO TWO COFFEE) on the Ground floor, offering coffee, beverages, and food.

answer:
ตอนนี้ที่ The Mall บางกะปิ มีโปรโมชั่นน่าสนใจหลายอย่างค่ะ
1. โปรโมชั่น Bangkok Bank M VISA Credit Card กับ Watch Galleria
- รับส่วนลดเพิ่ม 5% เมื่อซื้อสินค้าจากแบรนด์ที่ร่วมรายการ เช่น Rado, Mido, Tissot, Hamilton
- ต้องใช้บัตรเครดิต Bangkok Bank M VISA และมียอดซื้อขั้นต่ำ 10,000 บาทขึ้นไป
- โปรโมชั่นนี้ถึงวันที่ 30 มิถุนายน 2569 ค่ะ
2. โปรโมชั่นแลกคะแนน M Points สำหรับร้านอาหาร 10 ร้านดัง
- แลก 9 คะแนน M Points เพื่อรับส่วนลดสูงสุด 100 บาท
- ต้องใช้บัตรเดบิต Bangkok Bank M Visa Debit Card
- โปรโมชั่นนี้ถึงวันที่ 30 มิถุนายน 2569 ค่ะ
3. Siam Paragon มีคูปองส่วนลดเงินสด
- คูปอง 300 บาท เมื่อซื้อครบ 3,000 บาทขึ้นไป
- คูปอง 500 บาท สำหรับ Power Mall เมื่อซื้อครบ 5,000 บาทขึ้นไป
- คูปองหมดอายุวันที่ 15 พฤษภาคม 2569 ค่ะ
4. M Power White และ M Power Red
- รับส่วนลดเพิ่ม 5% สำหรับการซื้อสินค้าทุกแผนกในห้าง
- M Power White จำกัดส่วนลดสูงสุด 50 บาท และ M Power Red สูงสุด 100 บาท
- ใช้ผ่านแอป M Card ก่อนชำระเงิน
- โปรโมชั่นนี้เริ่มตั้งแต่ 31 ธันวาคม 2569 เป็นต้นไปค่ะ
ถ้าคุณสนใจโปรโมชั่นไหน หรืออยากทราบรายละเอียดเพิ่มเติม แจ้งได้นะคะ
ยินดีช่วยค่ะ!

question: How to put the points into the card after buying?
answer:
After you buy, just take a clear photo of your receipt showing the store name, date, time, receipt number, and amount.
Make sure the receipt is from the same day and from stores in The Mall or The Mall Life Store shopping centers.
Then, upload the receipt photo using one of these methods: the M Card app by selecting the Scan Receipt icon, or via LINE @MCard or LINE @TheMallGroup by selecting Scan Receipt.
You can upload up to 5 receipts at a time, but only 1 receipt per image.
Points are calculated as 1 M Point for every 25 Baht spent, or 1 point for every 50 Baht for certain categories like IT and gadgets.
Your points will be automatically credited to your M Card account within 24 hours after uploading.
You can check your points history anytime in the app under Profile > Receipt Scan History.
Just remember to upload receipts on the same day before 22:30, and the receipt must be in perfect condition to qualify.
Enjoy collecting your points easily!

question: How do I get points?
answer:
You can earn M Points easily with your M Card when you shop at The Mall Group!
Here’s how:
Earn 1 M Point for every 25 Baht spent at department stores, Gourmet Market, Home Fresh Mart, and online shopping within The Mall Group.
For Power Mall and online shopping within The Mall Group, you earn 1 M Point for every 50 Baht spent.
Plus, if you shop at The Mall or The Mall Life Store shopping centers, you can also scan your receipts to get points.
Just upload clear photos of your receipts on the same day using the M Card app or LINE @MCard.
You can get 1 M Point for every 25 Baht spent, or 1 point for every 50 Baht on certain categories like IT and gadgets.
Remember, points are credited within 24 hours and you can check your points history anytime in the app.
It’s a great way to collect points for discounts and rewards!
Would you like me to explain how to redeem your points too? [interrupt]

question: What is the M Card promotion thing?
answer:
The M Card promotion offers you some great discounts and privileges!
For example, you can get an on-top 10% discount for all department purchases in all stores at The Mall branches, including Power Mall, Gourmet Market, and Home Fresh Mart.
This discount is limited to 1 right per M Card number per month, with a maximum discount of 200 Baht.
You need to claim the coupon via the M Card application at the cashier before payment.
The coupon is valid for 120 minutes after claiming and can only be used for 1 receipt.
Just remember, some items like infant formula, alcohol, tobacco, gift cards, and medicines are excluded.
Also, you cannot combine this discount with other promotions or M cash coupons.
You can check your usage history in the M Card app anytime.

question: quick reply: Expatriate MCard
answer:
The ExpatriateM Card gives you a 5% discount on regular-price items in department stores with no minimum purchase, including online shopping in The Mall Group.
You also get a 5% discount at Gourmet Market or Home Fresh Mart when you spend at least 800 Baht, including online shopping.
For earning M Points, you get 1 point for every 25 Baht spent in department stores, Gourmet Market, and Home Fresh Mart, including online shopping.
At Power Mall, you earn 1 M Point for every 50 Baht spent, also including online shopping.
This card is designed for foreigners living in Thailand.

question: Summer cation
answer:
The Summer Cation promotion runs from March 5 to April 28, 2026.
It offers M Cash Coupons up to 7,000 Baht for M Card members and holders of Bangkok Bank M Visa, UOB, or Kasikorn credit cards.
You can also get free Puffy Bags on Fridays to Sundays and Puffer Bags on Mondays to Thursdays with qualifying purchases.
The total return can be up to 62%.
Here are some highlights:
- For M Card members, spending 12,000 Baht or more per day gets you a 600 Baht M Cash Coupon.
- Spending 30,000 Baht or more per day can get you 1,800 Baht, and 50,000 Baht or more per day can get Scarlet or Platinum M Card holders 3,500 Baht coupons.
- Bangkok Bank M Visa cardholders can earn coupons starting from 100 Baht for 3,000 Baht spend, up to 3,500 Baht for 50,000 Baht spend.
- Free Puffy Bags are available on Fridays to Sundays with a 3,000 Baht spend (excluding Power Mall and Gourmet Market).
- Free Puffer Bags are available on Mondays to Thursdays with a 6,000 Baht spend (including Power Mall and Gourmet Market).
The promotion is valid at The Mall Lifestore branches including Bangkapi, The Mall Korat, Emporium, EmQuartier, EmSphere, and Paragon Department Store.
If you want to know about bank card discounts, there are additional offers like up to 25% discount with Bangkok Bank M Visa and other cashback and point rewards from various banks.
Would you like details on how to redeem or specific store participation? [interrupt] [interrupt] [interrupt]

question: Summer cation
answer:
The Summer Cation promotion runs from March 5 to April 28, 2026.
It offers M Cash Coupons up to 7,000 Baht for M Card members and credit card holders from Bangkok Bank M Visa, UOB, and Kasikorn.
You can also get free Puffy Bags on Fridays to Sundays and Puffer Bags on Mondays to Thursdays with qualifying purchases.
The total return can be up to 62%.
To get M Cash Coupons, you need to spend a minimum amount per day, depending on your card type.
For example, M Card members spend 12,000 Baht or more to get 600 Baht coupon, or 50,000 Baht or more for 3,500 Baht coupon (Scarlet/Platinum M Card only).
The free Puffy Bag is available on Fridays to Sundays with a 3,000 Baht minimum spend (excluding Power Mall and Gourmet Market).
The free Puffer Bag is available on Mondays to Thursdays with a 6,000 Baht minimum spend (including Power Mall and Gourmet Market).
This promotion is valid at The Mall Lifestore branches including Bangkapi, The Mall Korat, Emporium, EmQuartier, EmSphere, and Paragon Department Store.
There are also additional bank card promotions with discounts, cashback, and M Points from various banks during this campaign.

question: มีเมนูโปรโมชั่นอะไรบ้าง
answer:
ตอนนี้ที่ The Mall Lifestore Ngamwongwan มีโปรโมชั่นพิเศษจากร้าน Pepper Lunch ค่ะ
- สมาชิก M Card สามารถแลก 1 M Point เพื่อรับชุดเมนูพิเศษ (Yakiniku Pork & Egg with Japanese Rice + Crispy Chicken Skin + Iced Green Tea 16oz) ในราคา 249 บาท จากราคาปกติ 328 บาท
- โปรโมชั่นนี้ใช้ได้ที่ Pepper Lunch สาขา The Mall Lifestyle Ngamwongwan, Bangkae, และ EmQuartier
- จำกัดสิทธิ์ 1 สิทธิ์ต่อ 1 ใบเสร็จ ต่อ 1 หมายเลข M Card ต่อเดือน
- ต้องแลกผ่านแอป M Card โดยสแกน QR Code ที่ร้าน และแสดงรหัสแลกสิทธิ์ให้พนักงาน
- รหัสแลกสิทธิ์หมดอายุภายใน 60-180 นาทีหลังแลก
- ไม่สามารถจับภาพหน้าจอเพื่อแลกสิทธิ์ได้ และไม่สามารถแลกคืนหรือเปลี่ยนเป็นเงินสดได้ค่ะ
นอกจากนี้ยังมีสิทธิพิเศษสำหรับสมาชิก M Card ที่ร้านอาหาร KOFUKU, AKA, ZEN, และ On the Table ด้วยค่ะ
- สามารถแลก 1 M Point ผ่านแอป M Card เพื่อรับส่วนลดหรือของแถมตามเงื่อนไขของแต่ละร้าน
- เช่น KOFUKU ลด 30 บาท เมื่อซื้อข้าวหมูย่างไข่ตุ๋น, AKA ฟรี Aka Toast, ZEN ฟรี California Temaki, On the Table ฟรี Choco Mousse
- มีเงื่อนไขการใช้จ่ายขั้นต่ำและจำกัดจำนวนสิทธิ์ในแต่ละร้าน
- รหัสแลกสิทธิ์หมดอายุใน 180 นาที และไม่สามารถจับภาพหน้าจอเพื่อแลกสิทธิ์ได้เช่นกันค่ะ
ถ้าคุณสนใจโปรโมชั่นร้านไหน หรืออยากทราบรายละเอียดเพิ่มเติม แจ้งได้นะคะ [interrupt]

question: Can I apply M Card?
answer:
Yes, you can apply for M Card!
For example, you can apply for the M Card Junior Club for kids easily via the M Card application by selecting the Junior Club icon and clicking to apply.
Also, if you apply for the Bangkok Bank M Visa prepaid card at Bangkok Bank branches inside The Mall Life Store, Emporium, EmQuartier, EmSphere, or Paragon, you will automatically get M Card membership too.
Just show your ID card to the bank staff to verify and activate.

question: What is M Card?
answer:
M Card is a loyalty program that lets you earn M Points when you shop at The Mall Group stores.
You get 1 M Point for every 25 THB spent at department stores, Gourmet Market, Home Fresh Mart, and online shopping within The Mall Group.
For Power Mall and online shopping there, you earn 1 M Point for every 50 THB spent.
You also enjoy special privileges during your birthday month through the M Card Application.
Plus, when redeeming points, you get a 12.5% on-top discount.
It’s a great way to get rewards and discounts while shopping!
Would you like to know about the different types of M Card?
